title: Observer Perception
description: Separates what the human observer reports seeing from what the sensor recorded (schemas/photographic-witness.schema.json) and from any AI inference (schemas/media-provenance.schema.json's model_assistance). First draft, not yet reviewed by Kemi; confidence is self-reported by the observer, not a measured quantity.

description.description: What the observer reports they saw, in their own words.

perceived_difference_from_capture.description: Any noted gap between what the observer saw and what the media shows (e.g. low light washed out detail, motion blur, obstruction).

confidence.description: Observer's self-reported confidence in their account, not a system-computed score.

examples.description: Community meeting, roughly twelve people, dim indoor lighting.
